5753.one_line_summary: Extension enabling NFTs to be locked and unlocked, preventing transfers while preserving utility.
5753.notes: Novel locking mechanism for NFTs allowing collateralized loans, rentals, and installment purchases without transferring custody.

5773.one_line_summary: Multi-Asset NFT standard enabling context-dependent output of different asset formats per token.
5773.notes: Enables cross-metaverse compatibility by storing multiple assets with priority ordering; propose-accept pattern for asset changes.

5791.one_line_summary: Minimal interface linking ERC-721 NFTs to physical chips via signature verification.
5791.notes: Bridges on-chain and off-chain ownership of physical items; uses chip signatures to authorize transfers.

5805.one_line_summary: Standardizes voting power tracking and delegation with checkpoint support and ERC-712 signing.
5805.notes: Supports multiple time-tracking modes (block number, timestamp); essential for DAO voting mechanisms.

5827.one_line_summary: ERC-20 extension enabling auto-renewable allowances that recover over time at specified rates.
5827.notes: Enables subscription and recurring payment use cases with automatic allowance recovery instead of unlimited approvals.

5850.one_line_summary: Standardizes storing complex numbers in bytes32 with real part in LSBs and imaginary in MSBs.
5850.notes: Non-domain-specific encoding standard for mathematical computations; supports cartesian, polar, exponential formats.

5851.one_line_summary: Soulbound Token standard for on-chain verifiable credentials with claim-based identity verification.
5851.notes: Defines metadata structures for claims and logic operators; supports issuer/verifier separation for KYC/compliance.

5883.one_line_summary: Social recovery mechanism for token transfers using neighbor approval with reputation scoring.
5883.notes: Uses tanh-based reputation formula weighing neighbor rewards and time; addresses lost private key recovery problem.

5902.one_line_summary: Event hook standard enabling contracts to respond to events via relayer network without off-chain processes.
5902.notes: Pub/sub pattern with registry, publishers, subscribers, and relayers; supports cross-chain messaging.

5982.one_line_summary: Role-based access control interface with bytes32 roles mapping to callable methods.
5982.notes: Follows ERC-5750 extensibility pattern; separates core, general, and metadata interfaces.

6047.one_line_summary: Mandates Transfer event emission during ERC-721 contract creation for indexability.
6047.notes: Removes exception in ERC-721 to enable complete transfer tracking from minting; aligns with ERC-1155 behavior.

6059.one_line_summary: Nestable NFTs allowing tokens to be owned by other tokens with parent governance control.
6059.notes: Parent-child relationships with propose-accept pattern; enables bundling, collecting, membership, delegation use cases.

6065.one_line_summary: Real estate tokenization standard extending ERC-721 with legal agreements, debt tracking, and foreclosure status.
6065.notes: Addresses on/off-chain reconciliation for physical assets; requires administrator entity for legal enforcement.

6066.one_line_summary: Signature validation standard enabling NFTs to sign and verify messages via isValidSignature(tokenId, hash, data).
6066.notes: Extends ERC-1271 for NFT use; enables office/role representation as transferrable NFTs in DAOs.

6093.one_line_summary: Standardized custom errors for ERC-20, ERC-721, and ERC-1155 tokens for gas-efficient error reporting.
6093.notes: Replaces revert strings with structured errors; provides consistent error decoding across applications.
